Patient date of birth, rounded to the first of the month
Patient date of death
Patient sex

Indicates whether the patient has a carer
Patient middle super output area (MSOA)
Rounded index of multiple deprivation
Indicates the official measure of relative deprivation in the UK
Provides both current and legacy residential institute codes
Date and time the patient registered with the practice
Date and time the patient registration ended with the practice
EMIS code ID of preferred language code
EMIS code ID of sexual orientation code
EMIS code ID of ethnicity code
Indicates if the patient record is active
Indicates if the patient has died
Indicates whether a patient has consented for data sharing; FALSE = Patient HAS a type 1 optout, TRUE/NULL = Patient DOES NOT have a type 1 optout
Indicates if the patient opted in to national data sharing; FALSE = Patient is OPTED OUT, TRUE/NULL = Patient is OPTED IN
The organisation that this data was replicated from
